key_risks: Hotter-than-expected May CPI on June 10 triggers broad equity selloff
FOMC June 17 decision or dot plot signals unexpected hawkishness
Oil price reversal if weekly inventory builds exceed forecasts

portfolio.rationale: High oil prices near $90 and EIA inventory draw forecasts support energy sector outperformance over the one-month window.
Recent 30-day outperformance of 5.23% and defensive characteristics amid sticky inflation and low GDP growth.
Stable net interest margins at current Fed target range and positive Q1 banking earnings trends.
ISM Manufacturing PMI at 54.0 signals expansion that can lift industrial earnings before July exit.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward inflation-resilient and cyclically supported sectors (energy, healthcare, financials, industrials) to capture relative strength versus broad market amid hot CPI/PPI prints and FOMC hold.
rationale_summary: Portfolio weights sectors with positive recent momentum and macro tailwinds from commodity prices and manufacturing data while avoiding rate-sensitive growth areas ahead of June inflation releases.
